MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT WSF BEVERAGE CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO THE 5TH, 6TH AND 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION OF THE COMPLAINT is Sustained with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
